pack.name: Water Heater Maintenance
pack.description: Sediment flushing, leak checks, and safety checks for tank-style water heaters.
pack.author: Home Maintenance Manager

tasks.name: Flush water heater
tasks.description: Drain sediment from the water heater tank.
tasks.instructions: Follow the manufacturer instructions. Set power/gas to a safe service mode, attach a hose, flush sediment, refill completely, then restore heat.

tasks.name: Inspect water heater for leaks
tasks.description: Check connections, pan, drain valve, and relief valve discharge path.
tasks.instructions: Look for corrosion, moisture, valve seepage, and water in the drain pan.

tasks.name: Review water heater relief valve
tasks.description: Confirm the temperature and pressure relief valve and discharge pipe appear safe.
tasks.instructions: Visually inspect the relief valve and discharge pipe. Follow local guidance and manufacturer instructions before operating the valve.
